text_raw: The seal remains intact... for now.
text_clean: The seal remains intact... for now.

text_raw: Return, and surrender your life to me!
text_clean: Return, and surrender your life to me!

text_raw: That serpent has sent its pawn to me, I see.
text_clean: That serpent has sent its pawn to me, I see.

text_raw: Tremble before the dominion of my power.
text_clean: Tremble before the dominion of my power.

text_raw: To bar my path is a sin beyond forgiveness.
text_clean: To bar my path is a sin beyond forgiveness.

text_raw: You have made yourself a hindrance.
text_clean: You have made yourself a hindrance.

text_raw: Surrender your breath to me, and I shall finish your torment.
